issues.description: Missing trigger condition for 'When a card is removed from your opponent's Life cards'. Current triggers (Activated, Trigger) do not capture the actual game event. Requires a custom trigger or OnLifeRemoved equivalent.
Missing 'duration' field. Text states '[Your Turn]' which requires duration:'DuringYourTurn' to restrict effect to your turn only.
Duplicate effect structure. Two separate trigger objects should be consolidated into one with proper conditions.
Missing 'Once Per Turn' condition. Should include a condition to enforce once-per-turn limitation.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] When a card is removed from your opponent's Life cards, draw 2 cards and trash 1 card from your hand.
